title: malus × floribunda var. aldenhamensis
intro: Malus × floribunda var. aldenhamensis is a variety of the hybrid apple tree, a cross between Malus baccata and Malus floribunda. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. The health benefits of Malus × floribunda var. aldenhamensis include its potential to help lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal uses.
